headline: Bam Azizi, Mesh CEO: A Fortt Knox Conversation
summary: Mesh CEO Bam Azizi told Jon Fortt his thesis: crypto is "built by crypto bros for crypto bros" and doesn't pass the grandma test. Mesh — fresh off a $75M Series C at $1B led by Dragonfly — abstracts wallet/chain fragmentation so users tap-and-pay. Born in Iran during the Iran-Iraq war, PhD from TU Munich, sold prior startup NoPassword to LogMeIn (2019). Mesh pivoted from B2C to B2B in 2022, post-FTX. Big bet: agentic commerce + microtransactions.

headline: A Look At Robinhood Markets (HOOD) Valuation After Post Earnings 13% Share Price Drop
summary: Robinhood Markets (HOOD) has been under pressure after its stock fell more than 13% following first quarter results that missed analyst expectations, driven by a 47% drop in crypto transaction revenue and a higher expense outlook. See our latest analysis for Robinhood Markets. The sharp post earnings selloff sits against a mixed recent record, with a 7 day share price return of 12.75% and a year to date share price return of 36.73% decline.
